queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the impact of lacking a checking account on credit default probability and risk mitigation factors.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: balance below 0 DM.
queries.question: Determinants of reduced credit risk associated with negative checking account balances in consumer lending portfolios.

queries.feature_definition: Savings account status: savings below 100 DM.
queries.question: Statistical correlation between minimal savings account balances and lower default rates in personal credit assessments.
